title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy
Show more

title: Java Full Stack Developer ( Fresher )
description:
Description




Our client is looking for a passionate and motivated Java Full Stack Developer (Fresher) to join their engineering team. This role is ideal for candidates who are eager to build scalable web applications using Java, Spring Boot, and modern frontend technologies like React.js or Angular. You will work alongside experienced developers to design, develop, and deploy end-to-end applications across frontend and backend systems.




Key Responsibilities

• Develop and maintain backend applications using Java and Spring Boot

• Build and integrate RESTful APIs with frontend applications

• Develop responsive UI components using React.js / Angular / JavaScript

• Work with databases such as MySQL / PostgreSQL / MongoDB

• Collaborate with frontend and backend teams for full-stack integration

• Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

• Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize applications

• Participate in code reviews and follow best practices

• Learn and adapt to new tools, frameworks, and technologies




Required Skills

• Strong understanding of Core Java (OOP, Collections, Exception Handling)

• Basic knowledge of Spring Boot

• Understanding of REST APIs and backend integration

• Knowledge of frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

• Exposure to React.js / Angular (basic level)

• Knowledge of SQL / NoSQL databases

• Basic understanding of Git/version control

• Good problem-solving and analytical skills

• Strong communication and willingness to learn

title: Engineering Trainee
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring Engineering Trainees to join our engineering teams and work on real

production systems under defined supervision and structured processes. This role is

designed for individuals who want a serious start in software engineering and are

comfortable working with responsibility from an early stage.

This is not an internship or learning-only role.

Key Responsibilities

As an Engineering Trainee, you will be expected to:


Work on assigned development tasks across backend and/or frontend systems
Implement features and fixes strictly as per provided specifications
Follow established coding standards, version control, and review processes
Assist in bug fixing and issue resolution under senior engineer supervision
Participate in testing, validation, and release preparation activities
Write clean, readable, and review-ready code
Maintain basic technical documentation for assigned work
Address code review feedback accurately and within agreed timelines


Expectations & Work Discipline


Strong adherence to engineering processes and instructions
Accuracy, completeness, and ownership of assigned tasks
Clear communication of blockers or uncertainties
Willingness to learn through reviews and feedback
Professional conduct in an onsite, collaborative work environment


Eligibility


Engineering / Computer Science graduate or equivalent
Trained fresher or up to 1 year of experience
Strong fundamentals in programming and software development concepts
Familiarity with Git or version control is preferred

title: Associate Analyst
description:
Organization: At Comm-Bank, we never lose sight of the role we play in other people’s financial wellbeing. Our focus is to help people and businesses move forward to progress. To make the right financial decisions and achieve their dreams, targets, and aspirations. Regardless of where you work within our organisation, your initiative, talent, ideas, and energy all contribute to the impact that we can make with our work. Together we can achieve great things.

Job Title: Associate Analyst

Location: Bangalore

Business & Team: COO - Retail Operations – Compliance Investigations/Disputes

Impact & contribution: As an Associate Analyst, you will be a self-starter who is passionate about delivering world class customer service, building strong relationships with the stakeholders and you will possess the following attributes:


A Can-do attitude, with the ability to work toward measures that deliver to customer experience and service quality
Demonstrating the ability to grasp concepts in a fast-changing environment.


Reporting lines:

Associate Analyst reports directly to the Manager of the Disputes/Compliance Operations Manager


Applicable to Only Level 3 and above


Roles & Responsibilities: You will be expected to perform the following tasks in a manner consistent with CBA’s Values and People Capabilities.

Core responsibilities:


Analyse disputed card transaction for both fraud and non-fraud transaction by investigating, exploring opportunities to identify recovery and mitigate losses and documenting and resolving claims.


Information and Payment required received from Government agencies/Local court are actioned with due diligence with quality outcome.


Engaging with both internal and external stakeholders to assist with investigation on root cause of losses
Analysing transaction challenges which cause chargeback losses and troubleshooting to determine the issue and working with subject matter experts to identify and execute solution
Work with clients to collect and document information that may be used to resolving outstanding disputes
Ensuring that all the Disputes cases are handled in accordance with the regulatory Requirement.


Essential Skills:


Fresher or 1-3 years’ experience working in a Banking role (preferably Cards/Statutory Compliance processes)
Knowledge on the Disputes resolution/statutory compliance process will be an advantage.
Proven ability to effectively plan and coordinate incoming work and enquiries
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent Communication and stakeholder management skills, support by collaboration mindset and possess a service-based mindset with strong customer focus.
Proven analytical, and problem-solving skills alongside deriving solutions for customers.
Highly motivated, result driven, team and customer focused
Detail Oriented - Exercise extreme attention to details; is thorough, accurate, organized, and productive and seeks to understand both cause and effect of a situation.
Good Judgement - The exercise of Critical thinking, analysing, assessing and taking ownership of outcome.


Qualifications:


Fresher (Graduate or postgraduate, preferable Commerce/Finance Background)


If you're already part of the Commonwealth Bank Group (including Bankwest, x15ventures), you'll need to apply through Sidekick to submit a valid application. We’re keen to support you with the next step in your career.

We're aware of some accessibility issues on this site, particularly for screen reader users. We want to make finding your dream job as easy as possible, so if you require additional support please contact HR Direct on 1800 989 696.

Advertising End Date: 21/04/2026

title: Software Engineer 1
description:
Role: Software Engineer 1

Location: Bangalore (5 days WFO)

Experience: 0-2 Years (Entry Level)

Gender Diversity candidates only (Must)

Requirements

We are looking for a motivated and curious Software Engineer 1 to join our engineering team. This is a foundational role designed for a fresher who is eager to apply their academic knowledge to real-world problems, build scalable applications, and grow alongside a team of experienced developers.

Key Responsibilities

As a member of our engineering cohort, you will:


Develop & Maintain: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality software applications
Write Quality Code: Produce clean, efficient, and maintainable code while adhering to industry best practices and coding standards
Optimize Performance: Proactively troubleshoot and debug applications to ensure peak performance and a seamless user experience
Document: Assist in creating comprehensive technical documentation and user guides to support product scalability
Evolve: Engage in continuous learning, staying ahead of the curve with emerging technologies and modern development methodologies


What We're Looking For


Experience: 0-2 years of hands-on experience in software development (valuable internships or significant academic projects are highly encouraged)
Core Fundamentals: A rock-solid understanding of software engineering fundamentals, Data Structures, and Algorithms (DSA)
Technical Stack: Proficiency in at least one major programming language: Go, Java, or Python
Web Basics: Foundational knowledge of front-end technologies, specifically React and Node.js
Mindset: An enthusiastic problem-solver who enjoys tackling complex challenges and thrives in a fast-paced environment
Education: BE/BTech degree, preferably from Tier 1 or Tier 2 institutions
Cloud Awareness: Familiarity with cloud ecosystems like AWS or GCP is a significant plus
Tooling: Hands-on experience with version control systems, specifically Git

title: Full Stack Developer – Generative AI (Fresher)
description:
Description




Our client is looking for a passionate Full Stack Developer with Generative AI exposure to join their growing engineering team. The ideal candidate should have strong fundamentals in full-stack development along with basic understanding of Generative AI, LLMs, and modern AI-driven application development. This role involves building scalable web applications, integrating AI capabilities such as chatbots or intelligent features, and working across both frontend and backend systems. Candidates with hands-on projects in full-stack development and AI/ML domains will be highly preferred.




Must-Have Skills

Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) and/or Python
Hands-on experience with React.js / Next.js
Basic understanding of Node.js / Express.js or FastAPI / Flask
Knowledge of REST APIs and backend integration
Understanding of MongoDB / SQL databases
Basic understanding of Generative AI / LLMs
Familiarity with Git/GitHub and version control
Strong problem-solving and coding skills




Preferred Skills

Exposure to LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.)
Understanding of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
Experience with LangChain / LangGraph or similar frameworks
Familiarity with Vector Databases (FAISS, Pinecone, etc.)
Knowledge of prompt engineering techniques
Basic knowledge of Docker and deployment
Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure)
Experience building chatbots or AI-based applications

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Gradute / DipTechnical Support Technician / Technical Executiveloma Engineers for Internship from EEE and ECE
description:
Reporting to: Technical Head

Qualification: ITI / Diploma in Electrical, Electronics, E&I, Mechanical, or related field

Experience: 1–5 years preferred

Job Summary

We are looking for Technical Support Technicians to support internal production issues and external field complaints. The role involves troubleshooting, testing, service coordination, and helping ensure smooth technical closure of issues during manufacturing and after dispatch.

Key Responsibilities

Support resolution of technical issues during production, assembly, testing, and dispatch
Attend field complaints and support fault diagnosis, corrective action, and closure
Assist in root cause analysis for technical failures and recurring issues
Coordinate with project, production, quality, and R&D teams for issue resolution
Maintain service records, complaint logs, test records, and closure reports
Support installation, commissioning, and troubleshooting when required
Ensure adherence to safety and standard operating procedures

Required Skills

Good troubleshooting skills in electrical/electronic systems
Ability to use multimeter, clamp meter, basic testing instruments, and hand tools
Understanding of wiring, panels, assemblies, and basic drawings
Basic documentation and reporting skills
Willingness to travel for field support when required

Preferred

Experience in power electronics, control panels, industrial equipment, UPS, ATS, inverter, or similar products
Exposure to customer complaint handling and service support

title: Financial Analyst, GFS FP&A
description:
Description

About the Organization: Amazon is a US-based multinational electronic commerce company headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Amazon.com started as an online bookstore, but soon diversified into many other categories, with a vision to be earth's most customer-centric company & to build a place where people can come to find and discover anything they might want to buy online.

About the role: Amazon's Global Finance Solutions (GFS) team is a fast-paced, team-focused, dynamic environment and delivering great experiences for our customers is top priority. GFS is seeking a Financial Analyst for EU CCT Finance team. The candidate would be responsible for financial close and performing related reporting, accruals etc. Additionally, the role would support monthly P&L analysis, perform financial reporting and forecasts, use financial systems and advanced MS Excel functions to work with large data sets, and perform headcount reporting, planning and forecasting. Additional responsibilities would include establishing, measuring and monitoring weekly KPI metric discussions for new and/or existing business initiatives and operational performance and assisting in measuring and reporting progress on key goals for the business team in a timely and accurate manner. The candidate would also perform ad-hoc business analyses and financial modeling, provide inputs for monthly and quarterly business reviews in a timely manner, facilitate business reviews with data analysis, identify and implement solutions to resolve, improve, automate, standardize, or simplify finance processes, and identify incomplete or inaccurate data, root cause of data issues, escalate discrepancies, fix data where possible or partner to deliver a solution.

Basic Qualifications


Experience using data to influence business decisions
CA fresher / 1+ years of experience in FP&A, closing of Books of accounts and reporting & analytics


Preferred Qualifications


Experience in managing, evaluating, analyzing data quickly and creating meaningful business reporting.
Good financial acumen with problem-solving and decision-making skills.
Manage competing priorities and meet deadlines.
Good interpersonal skills — including written and oral communication skills.
Advanced proficiency in Excel.
Retail industry experience.
Experience in VBA, COGNOS and SQL is a plus.


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Inside Sales Specialist (fresher)
description:
Company Description


Ayati Devices Pvt. Ltd., established on February 9, 2019, in Mumbai, specializes in innovative healthcare solutions in diabetes care. The company focuses on developing cutting-edge devices, such as a diabetic foot screener that enhances clinical efficiency and accuracy. This device aids clinicians in diagnostics and helps neuropathic patients monitor their conditions for better treatment outcomes. Ayati Devices is committed to improving healthcare through technological advancements that benefit patients and practitioners alike.


Role Description


This is a full-time remote role for an Inside Sales Specialist (Fresher). The Inside Sales Specialist will be responsible for generating leads, cultivating customer relationships, and contributing to sales strategies. Daily tasks include managing customer inquiries, ensuring customer satisfaction, conducting follow-ups, and converting leads to sales opportunities. The candidate will also collaborate with the sales team to achieve business targets and deliver an excellent customer experience.


Qualifications

Proficiency in Inside Sales and Lead Generation techniques for identifying and pursuing sales opportunities
Strong Communication skills to interact effectively with clients and team members
Customer Service and Customer Satisfaction skills to build relationships and maintain a positive client experience
Problem-solving skills and a customer-focused mindset to address client needs effectively
Ability to work both collaboratively with a team and independently in a remote environment
Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is preferred
Familiarity with healthcare or medical technologies is a plus, but not mandatory

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
As a part of the Talent, People and Administration team you are responsible for recruiting, scouting, hunting great candidates for building and growing our teams in accordance with the company’s strategy and vision. 




Your day to day responsibilities shall encompass: 

Fresher hiring, Campus engagement and recruitment drives
Lateral hiring, Job posting, application screening, interview scheduling
Source applicants through online channels, such as LinkedIn and other professional networks
Organize and attend job fairs and recruitment events to build a strong candidate pipeline
Keep records of interview process including interview notes, profile related paperwork, etc for reference as needed
New employee induction, on-boarding and training coordination
Obtaining consultants, freelancers and temporary staff if and when needed
Coordinate key team meetings
Ensure day-to-day smooth functioning of office and taking care of ad-hoc tasks such as travel arrangements, bill-payments, etc
Apart from the job functions of an HR, you will be required to ensure that the office functions efficiently on a daily basis. You will be required to ensure the well being of the office, reporting, making purchases for the office, and organizing, executing, and assisting with team activities and logistics (meetings, on-sites/off-sites, and team social events). etc




Skills to succeed in the role:

Must be able to thrive in a fast paced environment and be motivated to take on a new challenges
Excellent oral and written communication skills
Demonstrated ability to take initiative and work independently as well as in a team environment
Must be Proactive, Organized and Results Oriented with a strong sense of ownership




Hiring Process:

Assignment Round
Interview Round
Offer Letter




About DeltaX: 

DeltaX is a Data-Driven Digital Advertising Platform built for Agencies and Advertisers to optimally pla, design, buy, track, attribute and report ad campaigns across search, social media, display RTB, Mobile, Video and other media channels. Founded in 2012, the platform serves as the pioneer in the Advertising Technology Industry. The cutting edge technology has empowered digital marketing teams across the globe with deep insights, automated ROI based spends optimization, activating award winning technology- driven campaigns.

title: Senior Analyst - Assurance - National - ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv - Bangalore
description:
Requisition Id: 1693496

As a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services, we hire and develop the most passionate people in their field to help build a better working world. This starts with a culture that believes in giving you the training, opportunities and creative freedom. At EY, we don't just focus on who you are now, but who you can become. We believe that it’s your career and ‘It’s yours to build’ which means potential here is limitless and we'll provide you with motivating and fulfilling experiences throughout your career to help you on the path to becoming your best professional self.

The opportunity : Senior Analyst-National-Assurance-ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv - Bangalore

National :

National comprises of sector agnostic teams working across industries for a well rounded experience.

ASU - FAAS - Financial&AccountingAdv :

Assurance’s purpose is to inspire confidence and trust to enable a complex world to work. We do so by protecting and serving the public interest, promoting transparency, supporting investor confidence and economic growth and nurturing talent to provide future business leaders . We help clients by :


Ensuring their accounts comply with the requisite audit standards
Providing a robust and clear perspective to audit committees and
Providing critical information for stakeholders.


Our Service Offerings include External Audit, Financial Accounting Advisory Services (FAAS) , IFRS & US GAAP conversion , IPO and other public offering, Corporate Treasury - IFRS 9 accounting & implementation support etc

Your Key Responsibilities

Technical Excellence


We are looking for a GenAI / Agentic AI Engineer to build and deploy LLM-powered applications such as RAG assistants, multi-agent workflows, anomaly/outlier detection accelerators, and conversational analytics. The role requires strong Python engineering, experience with LLM orchestration frameworks, and the ability to ship cloud-ready, secure, production-grade solutions. Key Responsibilities
Build LLM/GenAI applications (chat assistants, copilots, Q&A systems) using RAG over structured/unstructured enterprise data.
Develop agentic/multi-agent workflows for planning, validation, and orchestration (tool use, task decomposition, reviewer agents, etc).
Implement backend services and APIs (e.g., FastAPI/Node/Express) and integrate LLM APIs (OpenAI/Gemini/Azure OpenAI).
Design ingestion pipelines: document upload ? chunking ? embeddings ? indexing (vector DB / semantic search) ? retrieval + generation.
Add evaluation & guardrails: prompt discipline, relevance checks, grounded responses, monitoring, and feedback loops to reduce hallucinations.
Package and deploy solutions using Docker and cloud services (AWS/Azure/GCP/Vertex AI), with basic CI/CD practices where possible.
(Nice to have) Work on anomaly/outlier detection use cases in finance / risk / fraud / audit analytics and explainability Required Skills (Must-Have)
Python for AI application development and API services.
Hands-on with RAG and at least one orchestration framework such as LangChain / LangGraph (or equivalent).
Experience integrating LLM providers: OpenAI / Gemini / Azure OpenAI (prompting, tool use, structured outputs).
Backend/API development: FastAPI or Node.js/Express (REST APIs, auth basics).
Solid fundamentals: data structures, problem-solving, clean coding and version control (Git).


Skills And Attributes

To qualify for the role you must have

Qualification


Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
Bachelor of Computer Applications
Certification in Data Analytics


Experience


Gen AI Fresher (0-1)


What We Look For

People with the ability to work in a collaborative manner to provide services across multiple client departments while following the commercial and legal requirements. You will need a practical approach to solving issues and complex problems with the ability to deliver insightful and practical solutions. We look for people who are agile, curious, mindful, and able to sustain positive energy, while being adaptable and creative in their approach.

What We Offer

Fuelled by the brilliance of our people, EY has emerged as the strongest brand and the most attractive employer in our field, with market-leading growth over competitors. Our people work side-by-side with market-leading entrepreneurs, game-changers, disruptors, and visionaries. As an organization, we are investing more time, technology, and money than ever before in skills and learning for our people. At EY, you will have a personalized Career Journey and also the chance to tap into the resources of our career frameworks to better know about your roles, skills, and opportunities.

EY is equally committed to being an inclusive employer, and we strive to achieve the right balance for our people—enabling us to deliver excellent client service while allowing our people to build their careers as well as focus on their wellbeing.

If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.

Join us in shaping the future with confidence. Apply Now

title: Intern - Merchant Onboarding (6 months Internship)
description:
Role: Intern- Merchant Onboarding (6 Months Internship)




Location: Bangalore - Ecoworld (Bellandur)




Roles & Responsibilities:

Assist with merchant onboarding, including collecting documents, performing KYC checks, VKYC, and enhanced due diligence (EDD).
Support merchant account activations and process account change requests accurately and on time.
Perform underwriting of merchant websites and identify patterns of fraudulent merchants.
Collaborate with the Business Team to resolve queries and ensure smooth onboarding.
Identify opportunities to improve processes and suggest operational enhancements.
Maintain required turnaround times (TAT) as per SLAs and ensure accurate record-keeping.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

Any fresher 2025 or 2026 passout - Available for 6 months internship(In office)

Quick learner, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.

title: Walk-in || Fresher Hiring For Airport Ground Staff
description:
Job Description: Airstriprealtech is seeking enthusiastic and motivated individuals to join our team as Airport Ground Staff. As a member of our ground staff team, you will be responsible for ensuring the safety and comfort of our passengers while they are on the ground. This is a great opportunity for freshers to kickstart their career in the aviation industry. Key Responsibilities: 1. Greet and assist passengers with check-in, baggage, and boarding procedures. 2. Ensure the safety and security of passengers and their belongings. 3. Provide excellent customer service to passengers by addressing their inquiries and concerns. 4. Handle and resolve any customer complaints or issues in a professional manner. 5. Assist in the boarding process and ensure all passengers are seated and ready for takeoff. 6. Communicate effectively with other ground staff, flight crew, and airport personnel. 7. Ensure the timely and efficient flow of passengers through the airport. 8. Monitor flight schedules and make necessary announcements. 9. Follow all safety and security procedures as per company policies and regulations. 10. Maintain a clean and organized work environment. Requirements: 1. Minimum qualification of 10+2 or equivalent. 2. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. 3. Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. 4. Customer service-oriented with a positive attitude. 5. Basic computer skills. 6. Willingness to work in shifts, including nights and weekends. 7. Must be physically fit and able to lift heavy baggage. 8. Prior experience in the aviation industry is a plus, but not required. We offer a competitive salary package and benefits, along with opportunities for growth and development within the company. If you have a passion for the aviation industry and a desire to provide exceptional customer service, then we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team as an Airport Ground Staff.

title: HR Trainee
description:
Job Description: HR Trainee – Operations

Department: Human Resources

Employment Type: Trainee / Full-Time

Location: Kharadi Pune

Service Agreement: Mandatory 2 Years

Role Summary

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented HR Trainee – Operations to support daily HR operational activities. This role provides practical exposure to core HR functions such as onboarding, employee lifecycle management, HR documentation, and coordination with internal teams and external partners.

Key Responsibilities HR Operations & Administration


Support end-to-end onboarding and offboarding processes
Maintain and regularly update employee records and HR databases
Assist in preparing HR documentation, employee letters, and compliance records

Support attendance, leave management, and employee data tracking


Employee Lifecycle Management


Coordinate with employees for joining formalities and document collection

Support employee engagement initiatives and internal HR communications


Compliance & Process Support


Ensure adherence to HR policies, processes, and SOPs
Assist in audits, statutory compliance documentation, and HR reporting
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data and records


Coordination & Reporting

Support HR projects and continuous process improvement initiatives

MBA / MSW / PGDM in Human Resources or equivalent (completed or pursuing)
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Proficiency in MS Excel, MS Word, and basic HR systems
High attention to detail with a strong willingness to learn
Ability to manage confidential information with integrity


What We Offer

Structured training, learning, and mentorship

At iD, we’re not just about food—we’re about nourishing lives and fostering a culture where every individual thrives.

Guided by our DNA, “Pure Food. Proud Lives,” we believe in offering an environment where employees are empowered to solve novel challenges every day, and every voice and opinion is valued. We are committed to building meaningful careers and place the highest priority on the well-being of our team.

title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
About the Company

ZeTheta Algorithms Private Limited (www.zetheta.com) is a FinTech start-up which has been recently set up and is developing innovative AI tools.

https://www.instagram.com/zetheta.official/




About the Role

We are seeking a talented and motivated student/ fresher intern to develop AI models from scratch within a 2 month timeframe. This is an extraordinary opportunity for a self-driven, technically skilled student to build a complete enterprise-grade system that incorporates cutting-edge AI technologies including deep learning.




Responsibilities

Design and implement the complete AI Models following provided specifications
Develop both frontend and backend components of the platform
Create and integrate AI modules
Design and optimize database schema and queries
Ensure system security, especially for sensitive identity verification data
Deploy the solution using zero-cost cloud services
Document code, APIs, and system architecture
Complete the entire project within the 2 month timeline




Qualifications

No experience required. Preferably, a student who is currently pursuing or fresh graduate who has recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field.




Required Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Strong programming skills in Python and JavaScript
Understanding of React.js for frontend development and Node.js for backend
Knowledge of FastAPI or similar Python web frameworks
Familiarity with database design and SQL (particularly PostgreSQL with Supabase)
Deployment on AWS with CD/ CI Pipelines and Manual Environment in EC2 instance, S3
Understanding of basic machine learning concepts
Self-motivated with ability to work independently




Preferred Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Sound knowledge of AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, Keras, HuggingFace Transformers)
Familiarity with computer vision techniques using OpenCV
Knowledge of natural language processing concepts
Sound knowledge of facial recognition or emotion detection systems
Understanding of identity verification methodologies
Docker containerization experience
Prior work with cloud deployment (AWS)




Who Should Apply?

Student or fresh graduate from any academic discipline.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office.
Willingness to self-learn and work in a fast-paced environment.




Internship Details

Duration: Self paced, options for 15days or 1,2,3,4 or 6 months.
Type: Unpaid

description:

Location: Remote

About Trijal Creatives
Trijal Creatives is a growth-focused creative and digital solutions agency helping businesses scale through branding, performance marketing, and innovative strategies. We are building a high-performance sales team to drive revenue and create long-term client relationships.

Role Overview
We are looking for a dynamic and driven Business Development Associate (BDA) who is eager to learn, grow, and build a career in sales and business development. This role begins with a structured Business Development Trainee Programme (45 Days) designed to equip you with practical skills and real-world experience.

Business Development Trainee Programme (45 Days)
During this On-the-Job Training (OJT) period, you will:
Gain in-depth understanding of Trijal Creatives’ services and offerings
Learn product pitching, client handling, and objection management
Get hands-on experience in cold calling, lead generation, and sales conversion
Work closely with senior team members on live projects
Performance Requirement During Training:
Achieve a revenue target of ₹1,00,000
Upon successful completion, you will receive a stipend of ₹18,000

Post-Training Role: Business Development Associate
After successful completion of the trainee programme, you will be promoted to Business Development Associate (BDA).
Key Responsibilities:
Identify and generate new business opportunities
Conduct cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn outreach
Pitch services and close deals with potential clients
Build and maintain strong client relationships
Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
Collaborate with marketing and operations teams for execution
Maintain CRM and sales reports

Eligibility Criteria:
Graduate (any stream) – Freshers can apply
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Basic understanding of sales and marketing (preferred but not mandatory)
Highly motivated and target-driven mindset
Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment

What We Offer:
Structured training with practical exposure
Fast-track career growth in sales
Attractive incentives and performance-based rewards
Hands-on experience with real clients and projects
Opportunity to work in a dynamic startup environment

Why Join Trijal Creatives?
Build a strong foundation in business development
Learn directly from industry professionals
Be part of a high-growth agency ecosystem
Opportunity to scale your career quickly based on performance

title: INTERNSHIP - FINANCE (CANDIDATES WHO HAVE COMPLETED THEIR CA INTERMEDIATE)
description:
Finance internship is a flagship program giving you a fantastic opportunity to join a fast-paced, growing bank with a reputation for doing things differently. We don’t want another cog in the machine, we’re looking for self-starters and bold thinkers who want to pave their own career paths.

This internship program offers an unparalleled unique opportunity to apply your academic knowledge to gain practical experience in a real-world setting, develop valuable skills, and gain exposure to various aspects of corporate finance.

As a Finance Intern, you will have the chance to work alongside our seasoned financial professionals, gaining hands-on experience in a variety of key areas and contribute to the growth and success of our organization.

You will have a well-rounded exposure to various finance functions and will be assigned to either of the finance functions assisting in financial analysis, budgets, and forecasts, participating in the month-end close process, account reconciliations, supporting preparation of regulatory filings, treasury packs, accounts payable and finance operations and supporting with special projects and ad-hoc tasks. You will also have get an opportunity to be rotated around in different verticals as per requirements.

Candidates from Tier 1 colleges to only apply.

Chartered Accountants Who Have Completed Their Intermediate.

Interns are required to work out of office - all 5 days.

Industrial Training/Internship Duration:


12 months with an opportunity to work in all financial domain/vertical, overall giving a well-rounded exposure to the incumbent.



Who can apply?


Fresher candidates who have completed their Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related fields from Tier 1 colleges
Aspiring Chartered Accountants (who have cleared CA intermediate)
Freshly qualified Charted Accountants looking for a jump start in their careers.



What are we looking for?


Great attitude with a strong learning drive
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Enthusiasm for learning and a desire to contribute to a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
If you are ready to embark on an exciting and rewarding journey to jumpstart your career in Finance, apply now and become a part of our dynamic team!



About Us We’re OakNorth Bank and we embolden entrepreneurs to realise their ambitions, understand their markets, and apply data intelligence to everyday decisions to scale successfully at pace. Banking should be barrier-free. It’s a belief at our very core, inspired by our entrepreneurial spirit, driven by the unmet financial needs of millions, and delivered by our data-driven tools. And for those who love helping businesses thrive? Our savings accounts help diversify the high street and create new jobs, all while earning savers some of the highest interest on the market. But we go beyond finance, to empower our people, encourage professional growth and create an environment where everyone can thrive. We strive to create an inclusive and diverse workplace where people can be themselves and succeed. Our story OakNorth Bank was built on the foundations of frustrations with old-school banking. In 2005, when our founders tried to get capital for their data analytics company, the computer said ‘no’. Unfortunately, all major banks in the UK were using the same computer – and it was broken. Why was it so difficult for a profitable business with impressive cashflow, retained clients, and clear commercial success to get a loan? The industry was backward-looking and too focused on historic financials, rather than future potential. So, what if there was a bank, founded by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs? One that offered a dramatically better borrowing experience for businesses? No more what ifs, OakNorth Bank exists. For more information regarding our Privacy Policy and practices, please visit: https://oaknorth.co.uk/legal/privacy-notice/employees-and-visitors/

About Us

We’re OakNorth Bank and we embolden entrepreneurs to realise their ambitions, understand their markets, and apply data intelligence to everyday decisions to scale successfully at pace.

Banking should be barrier-free. It’s a belief at our very core, inspired by our entrepreneurial spirit, driven by the unmet financial needs of millions, and delivered by our data-driven tools.

And for those who love helping businesses thrive? Our savings accounts help diversify the high street and create new jobs, all while earning savers some of the highest interest on the market.

But we go beyond finance, to empower our people, encourage professional growth and create an environment where everyone can thrive. We strive to create an inclusive and diverse workplace where people can be themselves and succeed.

Our story

OakNorth Bank was built on the foundations of frustrations with old-school banking. In 2005, when our founders tried to get capital for their data analytics company, the computer said ‘no’. Unfortunately, all major banks in the UK were using the same computer – and it was broken.

Why was it so difficult for a profitable business with impressive cashflow, retained clients, and clear commercial success to get a loan?

The industry was backward-looking and too focused on historic financials, rather than future potential.

So, what if there was a bank, founded by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs? One that offered a dramatically better borrowing experience for businesses?

No more what ifs, OakNorth Bank exists.

title: Aviation Ground Staff Fresher (Nagpur)

We provide a wide range of services including ground handling, cargo operations, and passenger services to various airlines. As a fresher, you will undergo a comprehensive training program to learn the skills and knowledge required for the role. You will be responsible for assisting in the smooth operations of the airport, ensuring the safety and comfort of passengers, and providing excellent customer service. Key Responsibilities: - Assist in the check-in process for passengers, including issuing boarding passes, checking baggage, and providing flight information. - Handle inquiries and resolve any issues or complaints from passengers. - Assist in the boarding process and ensure all passengers are boarded safely and on time. - Coordinate with other airport staff to ensure the efficient and timely arrival and departure of flights. - Conduct security checks and screenings as per airport regulations. - Handle and process luggage and cargo in a safe and timely manner. - Provide assistance to passengers with special needs, such as unaccompanied minors or elderly passengers. - Maintain a clean and organized work area at all times. - Adhere to all safety and security protocols and procedures. Qualifications and Skills: - Minimum of a high school diploma or equivalent. - Excellent communication and customer service skills. - Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. - Strong attention to detail and ability to multitask. - Basic computer skills. - Willingness to work in shifts, including nights, weekends, and holidays. - Must be physically fit and able to lift up to 50 lbs. - Prior experience in the aviation industry is a plus, but not required. Contract Details: This is a full-time position with a competitive salary and benefits package. The selected candidate will undergo a training program to learn the necessary skills and knowledge for the role. This is an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to start a career in the aviation industry and grow within a dynamic and fast-paced company. Location: The position is based in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India. The selected candidate must be willing to relocate to Nagpur if not already residing in the city. If you are passionate about the aviation industry and have a strong desire to provide excellent customer service, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity. title: CA/ACCA Fresher Corporate Treasury
description:
Financial Services Risk Management, Corporate Treasury Advisory – Analyst or ACon




About the Company




KPMG is a global network of professional firms providing Audit, Tax and Advisory services. We operate in 156 countries and have 152,000 people working in member firms around the world. KPMG in India, a professional services firm, is the Indian member firm of KPMG International and was established in September 1993. Our professionals leverage the global network of firms, providing detailed knowledge of local laws, regulations, markets and competition. KPMG in India provide services to over 4,500 international and national clients, in India. KPMG has offices across India in Delhi, Chandigarh, Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Pune, Chennai, Bangalore, Kochi, Hyderabad and Kolkata. The Indian firm has access to more than 7,000 Indian and expatriate professionals, many of whom are internationally trained. We strive to provide rapid, performance-based, industry-focused and technology-enabled services, which reflect a shared knowledge of global and local industries and our experience of the Indian business environment. KPMG Advisory professionals provide advice and assistance to enable companies, intermediaries and public sector bodies to mitigate risk, improve performance, and create value. KPMG firms provide a wide range of Risk Consulting, Management Consulting and Transactions & Restructuring services that can help clients respond to immediate needs as well as put in place the strategies for the longer term. With increasing regulatory requirements, the need for greater transparency in operations, and disclosure norms, stakeholders require assurance beyond the traditional critique of numbers. Hence assurance is being increasingly required on industry issues, business risks and key business processes. The Governance, Risk & Compliance Services practice assists companies and public sector bodies to mitigate risk, improve performance and create value. We assist our clients to effectively manage business and process risks by providing a full spectrum of corporate governance, risk management, and Compliance Services. These services are tailored to meet client’s individual needs, and provide effective support to management in meeting the challenges and opportunities presented by today's complex business environment. Our professionals provide the experience to help companies stay on track and deal with risks that could unhinge their business survival. Our services enable clients to effectively co-ordinate their key growth, quality and operational challenges and working in partnership with us, clients have the benefits of KPMG's experienced, objective, and industry-grounded viewpoints.




Key skills and qualifications

Bachelor degree like Bachelor in Business Administration/ Bachelor in Financial Accounting/ Bachelor in Banking and Insurance from a Tier 1 college/ institute along with FRM (both level cleared) in first attempt and/ or Chartered Financial Analyst from GARP
Strong academic record at 10, 10+2 and graduate examinations
Good understanding of corporate treasury operations and financial products
Understanding of Spot and Derivative market operations for interest rate, foreign exchange products including risk management (high level hedging strategies) and valuation aspects of the same
Well-versed in MS Excel, MS PowerPoint and Power BI. Should be able to build MS Excel based models for risk quantifications using various methods.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Leadership experience at school/college level preferable
High levels of commitment to work




Role and responsibilities

The candidate will be expected to assist assignments involving assisting Indian and international corporate organizations in their treasury operations
The candidate will be expected to assist Assistant Managers to Senior Managers in Corporate Treasury assignments including advisory / Internal Audit/ review of treasury operations areas such as foreign exchange risk management, interest rate risk management, commodities risk management, cash and liquidity management, borrowings management, investments management.
The candidate should be well versed with concepts like Value at Risk and its computational methodologies, Expected shortfall method, Sensitivity analysis, etc. Candidate should understand key concepts of financial risk management.
The assignments would include providing advisory / conducting reviews for the areas mentioned above covering strategy, policy, governance, day to day operations, process improvement opportunities, compliance to internal directives and regulatory requirements etc.
The candidate will be expected to take-up business development initiatives and assisting in creating proposals, responses to RFPs, thought leaderships, etc.
The candidate will be expected to have very strong communication skills and confidence to interact independently with junior to mid-level client personnel.
The position is based out of Mumbai and the candidate must be open to travel




Compensation is competitive with industry standards. Details of the compensation breakup will be shared with short-listed candidates only.
